name: get-to-know-you
tagline: ClawHub (66★): Dual-core efficiency improvement skill: (1) Actively collect user work background, preference habits through Socratic guided
verdict: The description is a 707-character wall describing broad, vague triggers, any negative feedback, any conversation, with zero exclusion language, so this skill can misfire and hijack conversations it has no business handling. It also runs python3 repeatedly with no availability check.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in description or body; triggers are broad (any negative feedback, any conversation) with no stated e
Description is a 707-character paragraph-length wall enumerating a (1)/(2) feature list, well past the ~1-5 sentence usable-dispatch-signal budget.
python3 is invoked repeatedly with no requirements section, availability check, or install guidance anywhere in the file.
